children.heading: Proposed rules and regulations
children.label: a Proposed rules and regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall issue proposed rules and regulations to carry out this part not later than 120 days after .June 30, 1980

children.heading: Final rules and regulations
children.label: b Final rules and regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall issue final rules and regulations to carry out this part not later than 90 days after the issuance of proposed rules and regulations under subsection (a).
